title: Insanity Project
description:
The official mod of the modded SMP

Offers a custom biome with new boss and creatures, some cool armor, a strong tool and more!
body:
## **The mod adds various features:**
- Custom **biome** »Shadowhills«
- Custom **boss** »Shadowguard« (only spawns in Shadowhills-biome)
- New 3D **tool**: Hammer
- New **armor**
   - Dirt armor (very bad)
   - Insanity armor (better than netherite, colors: blue and yellow)
- 2 new **music discs**
- and more smaller things 


### Check out [*Minecraft Insanity*](https://sites.google.com/view/minecraft-insanity) for the whole modpack or to join the SMP!
